commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation exec uccl-ep-perf-uccl-launcher-r4wgg -- sh -c "cp /workspace/out/uccl-perf-internode.log /workspace/out/uccl-perf-ll.log /tmp/ 2>&1; du -sh /tmp/uccl-perf*.log" 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete mpijob uccl-ep-perf-uccl --ignore-not-found --wait=true 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-nccl.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-nccl.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pods -o wide 2>&1'
